exercises.title: Euler's Identity
exercises.prompt: Set x = π in the great split — the most famous equation in mathematics.

exercises.title: The Impossible Logarithm
exercises.prompt: Take ln of both sides of Euler's identity — the logarithm of a negative number.

exercises.title: The Grand Finale
exercises.prompt: Close the book the way it opened: an integral, its bracket, and a clean answer — with π in the bounds.
